dashboard.noProductsDesc: Start with a barcode scan or add your first product manually.

products.title: Supplies
products.confirmDelete: Really delete? This cannot be undone.

consume.title: Remove quantity
consume.archiveWarning: Entire stock will be removed — product will be archived.

scanner.title: Scan barcode
scanner.description: Point camera at the barcode — you will be redirected to the form automatically.
scanner.cameraNoAccess: No camera access. Please allow it in your browser settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.installDescription: Install PrepTrack as an app for faster access and offline use.
settings.installTip: Tip: In Chrome/Edge, an install icon also appears in the address bar.
settings.notifSchedule: You will be notified 30, 14, 7, 3 and 1 day before expiry.
settings.locationInUse: "{{name}}" is still used by {{count}} active product(s) and cannot be deleted.
settings.csvExportDesc: For Google Sheets or word processing
settings.supportDesc: PrepTrack is free and ad-free. If you like the app, you can support development with a small donation. Thank you!
settings.impressumResponsible: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV:
settings.impressumDisclaimerText: The content of this app was created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the content. Use is at your own risk.
settings.privacyDataProcessingText: PrepTrack stores all data exclusively on your device (IndexedDB in the browser). No personal data is transmitted to servers or stored in a cloud.
settings.privacyExternalServicesText: When scanning barcodes, the Open Food Facts API (world.openfoodfacts.org) is contacted to retrieve product information. Only the scanned barcode is transmitted. Open Food Facts is a non-profit open data project.
settings.privacyNotificationsText: When you enable notifications, they are generated locally on your device. No push tokens or data are sent to external servers.
settings.privacyCookiesText: PrepTrack uses no cookies, no tracking, no analytics and no advertising. No data is shared with third parties.
settings.privacyRightsText: Since all data is stored locally, you have full control at all times. You can back up your data using the export function and completely remove it via your browser settings (clear website data).
settings.termsScopeText: These terms apply to the use of the web app "PrepTrack". By using the app, you accept these conditions.
settings.termsServiceText: PrepTrack is a free, ad-free Progressive Web App for managing supplies. The app works offline and stores all data locally on the user's device.
settings.termsAvailabilityText: There is no entitlement to constant availability. The app may be changed or discontinued at any time without notice.
settings.termsLiabilityText: Use is at your own risk. The provider is not liable for damages resulting from the use of the app, especially not for data loss. Regular backups are recommended.
settings.termsIPText: All rights to the app belong to the provider. The app may be used freely for personal use.
settings.termsDonationsText: Donations are voluntary and do not establish a contractual relationship. There is no entitlement to special services.
settings.installError:
The installation could not be started automatically.

To install PrepTrack manually:
1. Chrome/Edge: Click the install icon in the address bar (or Menu > Install app)
2. Safari (iOS): Tap Share > Add to Home Screen
3. Firefox: Menu > Install site

pwa.installDesc: Install PrepTrack on your device for faster access and offline use.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is safe.

imageErrors.tooLarge: Image is too large (max. 10 MB). Please choose a smaller image.

dbErrors.invalidJson: Invalid JSON file. Please choose a valid backup file.
dbErrors.invalidFormat: Invalid import format: No products found.
